message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Client as Client1
actor Client as Client2
interface Alias as Alias1
interface Alias as Alias2

Client1 --> Alias1 : HEAD
Alias1 --> Client1 : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

note left of Client1
  **Header**  **Value**
  Profile     <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>, <target-profile>
  Allow       target's Allow values
  Location    target URL
end note

Client2 --> Alias2 : HEAD
Alias2 --> Client2 : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

@enduml
